name: HRC_SEM_JOB_LOCS
description: This table is to store the job locations.

columns.Name: JOB_LOC_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key of the job location table.

columns.Name: JOB_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the Job ID referenced to the Job table.

columns.Name: COUNTRY_ID
columns.Comments: This is the country id of the address.

columns.Name: STATE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the state id of the address.

columns.Name: CITY_ID
columns.Comments: This is the city id of the address.

columns.Name: FQN
columns.Comments: This column indicates the fully qualified name of the location.

columns.Name: LATITUDE
columns.Comments: This is the lattitude of the location.

columns.Name: LONGITUDE
columns.Comments: This is the longitude of the location.

columns.Name: IS_ERROR
columns.Comments: This column indicates if there is an error in indexing event.

columns.Name: ERROR_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: This column contains the error message of the indexing event.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
